title: AuditFinding
description: One issue surfaced by the audit capability (an LLM lens or a mechanical tool-runner). TRANSIENT run-state, not a test work unit. Its fields are aligned to bug-record.schema.json so a confirmed finding can be filed via report-bug with no prose re-derivation: title/summary/expected/actual/suspect_files/suspect_symbol/intended_behavior_seed/severity map 1:1.

lens.description: Which focus scope surfaced this: an LLM lens (latent-bug, dead-code, doc-drift, performance, security, concurrency, error-handling) or a mechanical tool name (clippy-dead-code, cargo-audit, cargo-deny, cargo-geiger, cargo-udeps, dotnet-vulnerable).

source.description: llm = an LLM lens only; mechanical = a tool-runner only; corroborated = an LLM lens and a tool agree (skips refutation, pre-trusted).

severity.description: Impact. Maps to BugRecord.severity; used to rank confirmed survivors in synthesis.

title.description: One-line summary `[Area] symptom`. Reused verbatim as a BugRecord title.

summary.description: 1-3 sentence description of the issue. Maps to BugRecord.summary.

expected.description: What the code SHOULD do. Maps to BugRecord.expected. Optional for report-only lenses (dead-code/doc-drift).

actual.description: What the code DOES (the defect). Maps to BugRecord.actual. Optional for report-only lenses.

suspect_files.description: Repo-relative path(s) the issue lives in. BRIDGE: maps to BugRecord.suspect_files -> WorkUnit.target_file.

suspect_symbol.description: Language-qualified fn/method/type. BRIDGE: maps to BugRecord.suspect_symbol -> WorkUnit.target_symbol.

intended_behavior_seed.description: Contract sentence for the correct behavior. BRIDGE: maps to BugRecord.intended_behavior_seed -> WorkUnit.intended_behavior. Required when disposition is bug_record or work_unit_proposal.

evidence.description: The concrete proof: file:line, the offending snippet, the tool's raw note, or the reasoning that grounds the claim. Refuters judge against this.

refute_status.description: Outcome of the refute pass. survived = skeptics could not refute (keep). refuted = quorum refuted (drop, log). uncertain = surfaced, never auto-filed. not_refuted = bypassed refutation (mechanical or corroborated source).

refuter_votes.description: One entry per skeptic that voted on this finding (LLM-only findings).

disposition.description: Where the audit skill routes a survivor: report = cleanup list only (dead-code/doc-drift); bug_record = file via report-bug; work_unit_proposal = emit as data for tdd/triage to lift (audit never spawns authors itself).
